claim_readiness.claim_rule: A narrow hierarchical diagnostic claim requires H4/F4 to improve C-rate delta_capacity_Ah versus H3/F4, have paired condition bootstrap p05 above zero, and keep max outside-C-rate relative degradation at or below 5%. Intervals remain diagnostic unless grouped and C-rate coverage pass.

leakage_policy: Residual offsets, shrinkage factors, and interval radii are computed from outer training rows only. Parameter-set effects are never fit; held-out parameter sets fall back to stressor-family or global train residual offsets.
